sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40800" key="e)pi/semnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίσεμνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n40800.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rather proud,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).137</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
